data: {"generalSituation":"Winds are weak and it will be very hot over Guangdong in the next couple of days. Showers triggered by high temperatures will also affect the region. An area of low pressure is expected to develop over the central part of the South China Sea, it will move across the northeastern part of the South China Sea towards the vicinity of Taiwan in the latter part of this week. Under the influence of subsiding air, it will be extremely hot over Guangdong in the latter part of this week. A broad trough of low pressure will affect the coast of southern China over the weekend to early next week, there will be showers and squally thunderstorms over the region. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Jangmi will skirt the southern part of Honshu of Japan in the next couple of days.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260602","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods and isolated showers.
